channel.title: womens football on Grapefruitmoon.net
channel.description: Recent content in womens football on Grapefruitmoon.net

item.title: Women’s Euro Qualifiers – stats in Power BI
item.description: With the all-important Women's Euro Qualifier between Scotland and Iceland coming up on Friday, I thought it would be a good time to grab some of the data from the UEFA website and have a play with it in Power BI. I've got the data for all teams imported, the report below is filtered to show the key statistics for the two teams of interest. When I get a bit more time to spare, I'll detail the PowerQuery steps I took to get and transform the data.
